MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/per Early Settlemet Program. Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANT JOSEPH UDOVCH'S DEMURRERS TO CROSS-COMPLAINT OF THERESA UDOVCH.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST - 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. CROSS-COMPLAINANT TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING APPLICATION OF THE DOCTRINE OF EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL. DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ANY CLAIMS ABOUT PROPERTY SHOULD BE RAISED IN THE FAMILY COURT CASE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
